scripts.build: npm run test && npx tsc && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/renderer/index && cp src/renderer/index/index.html dist/renderer/index/ && cp src/renderer/index/*.js dist/renderer/index/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/themes && cp src/themes/*.css dist/themes/ && cp -r src/assets dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p dist/modules && cp src/modules/*.mts dist/modules/ && mkdir -p dist/services && cp src/services/*.mts dist/services/
